title: Device Home Screen - Connecting Headset when device list is empty
scenario: Newly connected headset does not appear in Poly Studio Mobile app device list after returning from Bluetooth menu with empty home screen
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app and ensure the Home screen is displayed with an empty device list (no previously paired devices shown).
2. Navigate to the device's system Bluetooth settings (e.g., Android Settings → Connected devices → Bluetooth).
3. Pair and connect a Poly Bluetooth headset (e.g., Poly Voyager 5200) via the system Bluetooth menu.
4. Return to the Poly Studio Mobile app (e.g., via the Recent Apps switcher or tapping the app icon).
5. Observe the Home screen device list.
expected: The newly connected Poly headset should appear in the app's device list on the Home screen.
